files.notes: This file contains only magazine masthead/subscription information that appears at the bottom of the contents page, not an actual article. The Current Topics article by James H. Anderson is not visible in the provided PDF pages.

files.title: Guide Lessons (Lesson Schedule)
files.notes: This is a lesson schedule listing lessons II through XX with their topics and dates from February through June. The file was severely truncated, containing only a fragment of the first two lesson titles.
